settings.heading: Design Your Own Trophy Online
settings.subheading: Tell us your idea and we'll design it — material, shape, engraving, logo and packaging — with a digital proof before production. Custom trophies, mementos and awards delivered across India.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: With Meru Trophy you can design your own trophy online: describe your idea (material, shape, engraving, logo) on WhatsApp and we send a digital proof to approve before we make it. Delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: How it works
settings.text: You don't need design software — just an idea. Tell us the occasion, the look you want and any references; we turn it into a finished design, place your names and logo, and send a digital mockup for approval. Tweak it until it's right, then we craft it in our Bangalore workshop and deliver. It's a fully custom trophy, designed online, with no design charge.

settings.title: Just describe it
settings.text: No software needed — share your idea in chat.

settings.title: We design it
settings.text: Material, shape, engraving and logo handled for you.

settings.title: Digital proof
settings.text: Approve a mockup before anything is produced.

settings.title: No design charge
settings.text: Design is included with your order.

settings.title: Tell us what you need
settings.text: WhatsApp, call or fill the form with occasion, quantity, material and date.

settings.title: Get options & a quote
settings.text: We share designs, matching past work and a clear quote — usually same day.

settings.title: Approve proof & advance
settings.text: Sign off a digital mockup; 50% advance via UPI/transfer/card with GST invoice.

settings.title: Made & dispatched
settings.text: Crafted in our Bangalore workshop, QC'd and tracked to your venue.

settings.question: Do I need design skills or software?
settings.answer: No — describe your idea and we design it for you, then send a proof.

settings.question: Can I see it before it's made?
settings.answer: Yes — a digital mockup for approval, refined until you're happy.

settings.question: Is custom design expensive?
settings.answer: Design is included free; you only pay for the award itself.

settings.question: How custom can it get?
settings.answer: Very — custom shapes, materials, sizes, photos, logos and packaging.

settings.heading: Ready to start?
settings.text: Message us your requirement and event date — we'll guide you through and quote, usually within the hour.
